This individual was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], this being had at least achieved the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] sometime before [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], having crafted a green-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] before that time. In that year, a [[Yinchorri Uprising|series of uprisings]] were springing up throughout the [[Yinchorri system]], a conflict which drew most of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] away from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Stationed at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on Coruscant at the time, this Jedi was present when a group of [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] infiltrated the [[Tower of First Knowledge/Legends|Tower of First Knowledge]] in an attempt to slay the [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiates]] housed there. The Jedi in the Temple [[Raid on the Jedi Temple (Yinchorri Uprising)|attacked]] the raiding party in force, this being among their number. Successful, the invaders were repelled and the Jedi only suffered two casualties, Jedi [[Tieren Nie-Tan]] and [[Jude Rozess]].<ref name="AOW" />

==Behind the scenes==
This alien Jedi was created by penciller [[Davidé Fabbri]] for the [[Jedi Council: Acts of War 2|second issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Jedi Council: Acts of War|Jedi Council: Acts of War]] comic book arc. Depicted at the beginning of the conflict in the Jedi Temple, this has been the Jedi's only appearance to date.

==Appearances==
*[[Jedi Council: Acts of War 2|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 2]] {{1st}}
